SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description1Txt: GRANTEE NAME: SPORTOWOUKRAINE: HOUSING REFUGEES FOR ONE YEAR WITH FOOD AND GOODS TO SUPPORT THEM
SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description2Txt: GRANTEE NAME: URR POLAND - JOANNA KOMARNICKA HOSTELPOLAND: PROVIDED FOOD, SUPPLIES, ELECTRICITY, LANGUAGE LESSONS, ETC FOR UP TO 200 MOTHERS AND CHILDREN
SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description3Txt: GRANTEE NAME: URR POLAND - HUMANOSHPOLAND: MEDICAL MISSION OF REFUGEE RELIEF & PURCHASE OF AN AMBULANCE
SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description4Txt: GRANTEE NAME: HIMALAYAN TRUSTNEPAL: CONTRUCTION OF 24 BED GIRLS' DORMITORY, BATHROOMS & DINING HALL AT THE SHREE BIRENDA JYOTI SECONDARY SCHOOL

ExpenditureResponsibilityGrp.ResultsOfVerificationTxt: THE FOUNDATION WAS NOT REQUIRED TO INDEPENDENTLY VERIFY ANY OF THE REPORTS SENT BY THE GRANTEE AS THE FOUNDATION HAD NO REASON TO DOUBT THE ACCURACY OF THE REPORTS PROVIDED BY THE GRANTEE. THEREFORE, INDEPENDENT VERIFICATION WAS NOT UNDERTAKEN.
